title: ✅ Letter 2 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +1.
content:
✅ Letter 2 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +1.
✅ Letter 3 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +2.
✅ If sequential Level 3s appear, only Letter 3 increments by +1.

📌 Examples:

ZAA.201 → ZBC.202
PQQ.111 → PRS.112
FGG.047 → FHI.048
BCC.017 → BDE.018

📌 Sequential Entries:

ZBC.202 → ZBD.203
PRS.112 → PRT.113

📌 LEVEL 2 (CONTAINERS FOR DRAFTS & ENTRIES)

✅ Letter 1 = Same as first letter from the last snapshot.
✅ Letter 2 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +1.
✅ Letter 3 = Third letter from the last snapshot, +2.

📌 Examples:

ZBC.202 → ZCD.203
PRS.112 → PRT.113
FGH.048 → FHI.049
BCD.018 → BDE.019

📌 Sequential Entries:

ZCD.203 → ZCE.204
PRT.113 → PRU.114
context: From document: 📜 FINALIZED RULES FOR THE NAMING STRUCTURE & UNIVERSAL SYSTEM — chunk 3 (chunk 3/6)
